title: linter fix from #14299
body:
podman pod clone somehow snuck by the new linter code that went in while it was in flight
fix that here

Signed-off-by: cdoern <cdoern@redhat.com>

<!--

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening

comments.body: Flake is our new nemesis, the registry hiccup. Restarted.

Restarted yet another flake, this time in `checkpoint` code, suspiciously like a [flake I saw earlier today in another PR](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6558471024803840/html/int-remote-fedora-36-root-host.log.html). I think we have a new checkpoint flake.
